allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_jhY4duGM0HkE@ep-wandering-cell-ape668pn-pooler.c-7.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require" -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pagos \(id_pago SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, id_paciente BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES paciente\(id_paciente\), id_paquete BIGINT REFERENCES paquete\(id_paquete\), fecha DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, monto NUMERIC\(10, 2\), metodo_pago VARCHAR\(20\), numero_comprobante VARCHAR\(20\), tipo_comprobante VARCHAR\(10\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'boleta'\);")
